title: Pugmeowla's Infinity Generator
description: Pugmeowla's Infinity Generator adds the "Infinity Generator" from Lucraft Core, this is an addon to Pugmeowla's Infinity Stone Core.
body:
### Pugmeowla’s Infinity Generator is an addon to Pugmeowla’s Infinity Stone Core that adds back the Infinity Generator from Lucraft: Core with new improvements and modern compatibility. This energy generator harnesses the immense power of the Infinity Stones to produce 100,000 FE per tick when one is placed inside. Designed for high-end late-game setups, it provides near-limitless energy for even the most demanding machines and modded systems. The generator also supports other custom or modded items through a specific item tag, allowing developers to add compatibility easily.  The Infinity Generator offers a incredibly potent energy solution for those who have acquired the Stones. **Join the discord server! Become a part of the community and view early teasers, ask questions, and suggest features!** ![Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea490904330b96a0b5cb0df904b0b4b0605e79d8.png)
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c261b79b33380118369f4deb3bd4a6ce0df8202f.png)](https://discord.gg/W5ZwaQbwan) [![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f9bb962b4558f1f11480e0ab885261c373f482.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@pugmeowla) [![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a947a55948cefe3a8dda706f9a2e9eda11f04d8.png)](https://ko-fi.com/pugmeowla)
